_comment: Free-form founder notes per cohort. Bake folds them into the cohort summary section as the `notes` field. Keep notes short; one or two lines each.

cohorts.alpha-001: Watching the first-recovery moment closely. Two of three early users hit it; the third lapsed before the third day.
cohorts.friends: Forgiving testers; useful for rough edges. Extension pairing is the recurring pain point.
cohorts.builders: Opens after alpha-001 friction is addressed.
cohorts.students: Multi-day investigation continuity is their loop.
cohorts.writers: Day-0 only; no return data yet.
